betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§7§oThe mob cannot be damaged through normal ranged and melee weapons (things like Zenith and Kikoku can do damage but will not produce drops). Magic damage, Electroblob spells, the railgun, and other magic weapons will work!

§fI can do it. So I do it.
This, this may be the problem. 
I get carried away. I keep going, way past... what's reasonable, what's good.
Then, it all comes crashing down.
And who is it that pays for it?
My poor poor body.
One more fascinating truth to be discovered. One more beautiful place to explore. One more dangerous enemy to defeat.
In the meantime, my physical body, it keeps deteriorating.
And now, it is exhausted, I am exhausted.
Yes, I am still one with my body. It exists, and it has needs. Needs I have been ignoring, neglecting.
This, some time away. To witness. To behold.
I needed this. I really did.
A bit more, and I would have been gone. A disembodied Ascended.
Just like them, the Elder Ones. Broken away from reality, and now plotting to influence it, but unable to do it directly, and so being forced to ensnare others.
No, my body, my finiteness, is what grounds my Ascension. What makes me care, the thing that gives a direction to my pursuits.
Not something to be discarded as obsolete. Something to embrace.
